      <li parentName="ol">{`For `}<strong parentName="li">{`Dependency Rule`}</strong>{`, select `}<strong parentName="li">{`Up to Next Major Version`}</strong>{`.`}</li>

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "import-and-register-the-brand-concierge-extension"
    }}>{`Import and register the Brand Concierge extension`}</h2>
    <p>{`Import the AEPBrandConcierge framework and its dependencies, then register the Brand Concierge extension (and dependencies) in `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`application(_:didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:)`}</inlineCode>{` in your `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AppDelegate`}</inlineCode>{`:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`import AEPBrandConcierge
import AEPCore
import AEPEdge
import AEPEdgeIdentity
import UIKit

class AppDelegate: UIResponder, UIApplicationDelegate {
    func application(_ application: UIApplication, didFinishLaunchingWithOptions _: [UIApplication.LaunchOptionsKey: Any]?) -> Bool {
        // Optionally enable debug logging
        MobileCore.setLogLevel(.trace)

        let extensions = [
            Concierge.self,
            Identity.self,
            Edge.self
        ]

        MobileCore.registerExtensions(extensions) {
            // Use the App ID assigned for this application from Adobe Data Collection (formerly Adobe Launch)
            MobileCore.configureWith(appId: "MY_APP_ID")
        }

        return true
    }
}
`}</code></pre>
